commit.message:
Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

The previous logic checked if "npm" appeared in output, but error messages
like "which: npm: Command not found" also contain "npm", causing false
positives. Now uses the exit code from `which` directly.

commit.message:
Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): merge coplanar wall faces to prevent stretch artifacts

After Case 3 extrude, gap-filling triangle walls share vertices with
moved corners. Subsequent extrudes move those corners, stretching the
triangles into large sloping faces. Fix: merge coplanar wall faces
into adjacent side faces immediately after creation. The side face
absorbs the triangle into a larger polygon that stretches correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

S0: restaurar .cpanel.yml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): hide coplanar edges in HEMesh edge rendering

After split-face extrusion, wall faces share coplanar edges with
adjacent side faces. buildHEEdgeGeometry was rendering ALL topology
edges, including these coplanar ones, creating visible diagonal lines
across stair side faces. Now skips edges where both adjacent faces
have matching normals and lie on the same plane.

Also removes diagnostic logging from applyPushPull (kernel is stable).

fix: restore desktop chat bubble layout with cb-* CSS rules

renderChatMessage() generates cb-row/cb-slave/cb-queen/etc. HTML for both
#chatContent (desktop) and #mob_chatContent (mobile). Mobile rules were
scoped to #mob_chatContent only, leaving desktop unstyled.

Added matching #chatContent .cb-* rules to public/css/chat.css (outside
any media query) so desktop gets the same WhatsApp-style bubble layout
with slightly larger fonts appropriate for desktop viewing.
Mobile CSS is completely untouched.

feat: complete all 20 sprints — AI agentic actions, learning database, profitability engine

Sprint 20 — AI Agentic Actions:
- 6 action tools: move_client, move_multiple_clients, reorder_stops, create_route, deactivate_route, update_cost_config
- ActionConfirmCard.tsx — confirmation UI with before/after preview
- ai-actions.service.ts — atomic action executors with PostgreSQL transactions
- ai-actions.router.ts — owner-only endpoints with draft-season enforcement
- Full audit trail in rpw_ai_action_log
- tool_use integration with Anthropic API

Sprint 19 — Learning Database:
- rpw_season_snapshots, rpw_performance_actuals, rpw_client_history tables
- SeasonHistoryModal, EnterActualsModal components
- Historical AI context (prior seasons, margin trend)

All 20 sprints complete. Ready for production deployment.

- Reset submittingRef in startTopic, handleResumeQuiz, and retry-mode

feat: prompt user to star GitHub repos after install (#71)

After installing a skill from GitHub via `ion add`, prompt the user
with `Star owner/repo on GitHub? [Y/n]`. Uses `gh repo star` and
tracks prompted repos in ~/.config/ion/starred.json to avoid
re-prompting. Silently skips in non-interactive environments or
when gh is unavailable.

Orchestrator searches URL first, then dispatches to agents in parallel

- Orchestrator: google_search to identify company → dispatch URL to 4 agents
- Each agent: web_crawl on the IR page independently to find their data
  - IR agent: crawls aktsk.jp/ir/ → finds PDFs → fetches EDINET
  - Audio agent: crawls aktsk.jp/ir/ → finds YouTube link → downloads
  - Macro agent: google_search for sector policy
  - Satellite agent: geocode HQ address → task satellite
- More natural flow: agents receive URL and search independently

commit.message:
feat(starship): replace custom.worktree with chpwd-cached env_var (#3)

## Summary
- starship の `custom.worktree` モジュール（毎プロンプトで外部スクリプトを fork/exec）を、zsh の
`chpwd` フック + 環境変数キャッシュ方式に置き換え
- ディレクトリ表示が `command_timeout`（500ms）超過で消える問題を根本的に解消
- `starship timings` で `<1ms` に高速化

## Test plan
- [ ] 新しいターミナルで初回プロンプトにディレクトリが表示される
- [ ] git repo / 非 git ディレクトリ / worktree / サブディレクトリ間の `cd` で正しく表示が更新される
- [ ] `starship timings` に `custom.worktree`
が表示されず、`env_var.STARSHIP_WORKTREE_DIR` が `<1ms`
- [ ] 高負荷時でもディレクトリ表示が消えない

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: reconnect WebSocket on each reset, close on cleanup

Prevents session leaks — each reset() closes the old connection
and opens a fresh one. __del__ ensures cleanup if TRL drops the
env instance without explicit close.

commit.message:
Fix E2E subprocess stderr inheritance causing go test WaitDelay failure

Replace cmd.Stderr = os.Stderr with bytes.Buffer capture in all long-running
subprocess launches. The inherited stderr pipe kept go test waiting for I/O
to drain after the test binary exited, causing "WaitDelay expired" in CI.

commit.message:
Add multi-mob packs and rare mobs with affixes

Combat now spawns packs of 1-5 mobs per encounter (weighted by band).
AoE skills damage all pack mobs simultaneously while single-target only
hits the front mob, giving AoE a real mechanical advantage. Rare mobs
(5-18% chance) roll 1-4 unique affixes (Mighty, Frenzied, Armored,
Empowered, Regenerating) with multiplicative HP/loot stacking and
combat effects (damage amp, attack speed, DR, regen). All new state
is ephemeral — no save migration needed.
